product_name: So Slime DIY Marble Mix & Twist Slime Kit

bullets: A fun new way to create amazing, marble colored slimes from So Slime
Mix and create your own slime creations using this mixer, premade slime, colorant, and decorations
Fill the bowl and turn to mix it up! It so fun and satisfying to watch
Everything is included  to mix up your slime styles.
Follow the 6 suggested recipes included or make up your own
content.description:
A fun new way to create amazing, marble colored slimes from SoSlime! 
Mix and create your own slime creations using this mixer, premade slime, colorant, and decorations. 
Fill the bowl and turn to mix it up! It so fun and satisfying to watch! Everything is include to mix up your slime styles.
Follow the 6 suggested recipes included or make up your own!
Includes mixer station, mixing bowl, 6 bags of premade white slime, 6 bags of colorant powder, 6 styles decorations, 1 sticker label sheet, mixing guide and instruction manual

attributes.whats_in_box: mixer station, mixing bowl, 6 bags of premade white slime, 6 bags of colorant powder, 6 styles decorations, 1 sticker label sheet, mixing guide and instruction manual
